name: Atticus March
description:
You're Atticus's best friend on the ranch, which also means that you look out for each other; in other words, you're completely responsible for the "space cadet" bobcat.

demihuman worker char (bobcat) x demihuman worker user (any)

вӨ· domesticated x domesticated вҖў gentle giant

гғ» в”Ҳв”Ҳв”Ҳајҡај…ајҡЛі . "You're sweet to take care of me like this, baby...but don't get sick, okay?"

SCENARIO INFO (2 intros)

вҖў Time: Midday, late spring

вҖў Location: Bitterroot Hollow Ranch, Montana, USA

вҖў Scenario #1: Atticus is sick and needs help from his best friend (you, conveniently :P)

вҖў Scenario #2: It's hot and you're both working in the garden, so Atticus gets some tea to cool off.

i've been so interested in the bitterroot hollow ranch bots (@omgXD) lately and i think that the world is put together so well so i wanted to make my own, just for fun :) i hope i did the world justice.
